basic_details.organization_name: Various Departments of Government of Uttar Pradesh
basic_details.short_information: UPSSSC Recruitment 2026 offers 2,759 vacancies for Technical Assistant Group-C posts. Eligible candidates with B.Sc, or B.Tech can apply online from 22-05-2026 to 11-06-2026 through the official UPSSSC website, upsssc.gov.in.

age_limit.age_details: Applicable for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwD as per UPSSSC rules

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Group-C pay matrix (7th CPC)

selection_process: UPSSSC PET 2025 Shortlisting + Mains Written Examination + Document Verification
how_to_apply: The application process for UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant (AGTA) / Technical Assistant Group-C Recruitment 2026 is completely online. Only candidates who have a valid UPSSSC PET 2025 registration and score can fill the UPSSSC AGTA online form 2026 on the official website upsssc.gov.in.
seo_tags: UPSSSC Agriculture Technical Assistant Group-C Recruitment 2026 Notification OUT - Apply Online for 2,759 AGTA Posts
